title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2023-02 Dated February 01, 2023 Entitled "resolution Realigning Certain Portions of the 20% Municipal Development Fund Cy 2023 Current Approproation Amounting to Seven Million Two Hundred Thousand Pesos (P 7,200,000.00) for Various Purposes and Approving the Same. Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 02/06/2023
